domain: Korean gayageum 12-string zither (12 silk strings in 6 unison/octave pairs; pentatonic scale tuning; movable bridges for per-string fine-tune; 2.5-octave range; ancient Korean traditional instrument)
specific_mechanism: GAYAGEUM-12-BAND-PENT: 12-band pentatonic-mode RoPE frequency allocation with 6-pair structure + movable-bridge learnable per-band offset. (1) Per attention head, allocate 12 RoPE frequency bands {f_1, ..., f_12} discretized at pentatonic 5-note positions per octave (5 notes × 2.5 octaves = 12.5 ≈ 12 bands). (2) Pair structure: bands grouped into 6 pairs; each pair shares K but uses unison-or-octave V scaling (octave pair: V scale ×2; unison pair: V duplicate). (3) Movable-bridge: per-band learnable fine-tune offset δ_band ∈ R within pentatonic mode allows small adjustments without breaking modal structure. (4) Bandwidth scaled to 2.5× base period. (5) Differs from R468 PIPA-4BAND (4-band linear) + R482 COMPAS-12-CYCLE (12-position decode budget, not RoPE band).
llm_application: GAYAGEUM-12-BAND-PENT 12-band pentatonic-mode RoPE allocation + 6-pair unison/octave structure + movable-bridge per-band offset + 2.5-octave bandwidth. Differs from R402 TUVAN-IGIL (igil string). R416 XALAM-FREQ. R431 TAONGA-MICRO-BAND. R440 TUVAN-PHANTOM-CHANNEL. R457 IMZAD-HARMONIC-BASIS. R468 PIPA-4BAND (4-band — closest, this is 12-band pentatonic). R279 PTCH (integer-ratio SVD). R482 COMPAS-12-CYCLE (12-position not RoPE band). Differs from Frequency Bands RoPE ICLR 2026 (frequency-band emergence + θ-context-length intervention — closest, but no explicit pentatonic + 6-pair structure). RoPE Context Extension (band extension). Attention Mechanism Generic. LLM Fundamentals. Differs by 12-BAND PENTATONIC MODE + 6-PAIR UNISON/OCTAVE + MOVABLE-BRIDGE PER-BAND OFFSET.
novelty_claim: Frequency Bands RoPE + RoPE Context Extension + Attention Mechanism cover RoPE frequency-band paradigm. GAYAGEUM-12-BAND-PENT adds (a) pentatonic 5-note discretization + (b) 6-pair structure + (c) movable-bridge per-band offset. Recombination — borderline lookup.
content_words: 12-band pentatonic RoPE frequency allocation per head

llm_side: 12-band pentatonic RoPE frequency allocation per head
